response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software engineering experience across full-stack web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background from recent roles at re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE Capital, plus AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot experience (TS, Java, D, C/C++, PHP, Swift), and MongoDB/AWS exposure. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, React experience is light relative to backend depth, no PostgreSQL/Kubernetes called out specifically, and no Vitest mention — but all are reasonable to bridge given the seniority and breadth.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work directly relevant to the role
Strong craftsmanship signal: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development, open-source maintainer, workshop instructor
Polyglot across TS, Java, D, C/C++, with MongoDB, Docker, AWS CDK exposure covering most stack requirements
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; React depth is unclear relative to backend work
No PostgreSQL or Kubernetes/cloud-native ops explicitly mentioned (MongoDB and Docker only)
All employer locations listed as 'Kenya' appears to be a resume data error worth clarifying

key_factors.factor: Software craftsmanship and testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
Missing explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL experience
